message.content:
In short - we are not going to reinvent the wheel. We want to test  our guess, that customers who dont really know exact product they are looking for, we can propose them advanced search , that detect customers intent, rather that product description match search.

In general we want to build feature in a few iteration very fast and test is it usefull, is it profitable for us.. and then if it is pofitable, to pick bette tool for it.

We chose handmade setup, because it's fast
- We dont need to cheange cintract with Algolia, or negothiate with other companies. 
It is cheap 
- under 150$ per month, 
It is easy 
 CC makes it really easy to build and finetune

v1 - just test placement and idea of some kind of assistant and product finder, without any AI flavor thinks
v2 - add LLM support to the feaure to ask auxiliary questions to the customer, to clarify intent and some product/ocassion details he is looking for
v3 - ???

paraphrase it , not change it to much, just fix grammar

content.text:
We're not reinventing the wheel. We want to test our hypothesis that customers who don't know exactly what they're looking for would benefit from an advanced search that detects customer intent, rather than matching product descriptions.

We want to build this feature in a few fast iterations and test whether it's useful and profitable — then, if it is, pick a better tool for it.

We chose a handmade setup because it's fast:
- No need to renegotiate contracts with Algolia or other vendors
- Cheap — under $150/month
- Easy — Claude Code makes it simple to build and fine-tune

**v1** — Test the placement and idea of some kind of assistant/product finder, without any AI-flavored logic  
**v2** — Add LLM support to ask auxiliary questions, clarifying the customer's intent and the product/occasion details they're looking for  
**v3** — ???

hookInfos.command: case "$TERM_PROGRAM" in ghostty) B='com.mitchellh.ghostty';; iTerm.app) B='com.googlecode.iterm2';; WarpTerminal) B='dev.warp.Warp-Stable';; Apple_Terminal) B='com.apple.Terminal';; *) B='';; esac; terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -message 'Claude finished' -sound 'Glass' ${B:+-activate "$B"} 2>/dev/null || true
